stem: A digital marketing study surveys 40 users shown the ad and observes 4 positive outcomes out of 40 (10.0%). Estimate the true click-through rate and provide a 95% confidence interval.

ground_truth.answer: Sample proportion: 0.1. Wilson 95% CI: [0.0396, 0.2305]. Point estimate: 0.135.

common_failure_modes: Using the Wald interval (p̂ ± z√(p̂(1-p̂)/n)) which performs poorly for small samples
Not reporting the confidence interval alongside the point estimate
